THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1828 EDDY STREET HOA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PANLASIGUI, ADELFA $3,851.67 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,901.67, 3 MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $962.92 AND FOURTH PAYMENT OF $962.91. COSTS TO BE ADDED TO THE FINAL PAYMENT. THE FIRST PAYMENT IS TO BE PAID ON JANUARY 15, 2014 AND PAYMENT WILL BE DUE ON THE 15TH OF THE MONTH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
